HGSS.480.0000:
I am the Fishing Dude, the elder of
the Fishing Bros.\f
Have you met the Fishing Guru at
Lake of Rage?\f
He dreams about seeing the world’s
greatest MAGIKARP.\f
If you don’t mind, could you show him
any MAGIKARP you catch?\f
Who knows, you may catch the
MAGIKARP of his dreams.
HGSS.480.0001:
You found something in between
the pages...\f
It’s a photo of people fishing...
They look identical!
